note: Exit numbers equal mileposts statewide. Town Pump is Montana's dominant homegrown truck stop chain (listed as brand Independent). I-15 and I-90 share the roadway around Butte (exits ~121-129); Butte-area stops are listed under I-90. Services are sparse on I-94 east of Miles City and on I-15 north of Great Falls.
